title: support building from commit (not ref) in git repo
body:
**Description**

Sometimes it's nice to build directly from a git commit in a git repo.

For example:

```
podman build https://github.com/coreos/coreos-assembler.git#73bdf387a9d25b461f718c76fa3455902acfddfb
Error: error prepping temporary context directory: cloning "https://github.com/coreos/coreos-assembler.git#73bdf387a9d25b461f718c76fa3455902acfddfb" to "/var/tmp/buildah2533916938":
Cloning into '/var/tmp/buildah2533916938'...
fatal: Remote branch 73bdf387a9d25b461f718c76fa3455902acfddfb not found in upstream origin
: exit status 128
```

This shouldn't be too hard to do with something like:

```
mkdir foo
cd foo
git init .
git fetch https://github.com/coreos/coreos-assembler.git 73bdf387a9d25b461f718c76fa3455902acfddfb --depth=1
git checkout FETCH_HEAD
```

comments.body: Hi @dustymabe , Thanks for creating the issue. Following PR https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4149 should close this.
